And so the way to think about it is you need to be by far the most credible, fresh, and up-to-date answer to people's questions in the long tail in order to be part of the answer.
And what we're seeing is for a lot of customers, the LLM referral traffic is converting at three to five times higher than even brand traffic.
And so it's almost like the first sales call is happening inside of these services like ChatDpt and Perplexity.
And the average session time there is like 15 to 20 minutes.
So, and they're giving away a lot more context about who they are, their struggle.
Their pain points.

And so it's influencing people's decisions a lot more.
